releaseNotes: Version 1.0.0 build 122: adds a result outputs panel for opening SRT, TXT, VTT, ASS, and video files directly, while keeping styled ASS export, VTT/TXT/SRT outputs, GitHub API update checking, ASR Quality Report, SRT QA, PolyWAV BOOM/LAV channel selection, Burned MP4 export, Lithuanian/English output, and offline setup.
